items.title: Business permit renewal period extended
items.summary: The deadline for the annual renewal of business permits has been extended. Visit the BPLO at the Municipal Hall or check the requirements online.

items.title: Free immunization drive in all 7 barangays
items.summary: The Municipal Health Office will conduct a free immunization and deworming program. See the schedule per barangay below.

items.title: Sangguniang Bayan passes solid waste ordinance
items.summary: A new ordinance strengthening segregation-at-source and the municipal materials recovery facility has been approved on third reading.

items.title: Invitation to bid: farm-to-market road project
items.summary: The Bids and Awards Committee invites eligible contractors to bid for the concreting of a farm-to-market road. Documents available at the BAC Secretariat.

items.title: 11th Pangisraan Festival — schedule of activities
items.summary: Magkaradya, kita! The schedule for the town's Pangisraan Festival has been released — civic parade, agri-trade fair, street dancing, and cultural night.
